channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: QuantumVM - Fri Jun 26 01:46:28 UTC 2026
item.description:
OpenQASM 3.0 support for JetBrains IDEs with LSP integration and runtime execution. Features: Syntax highlighting for .qasm files using TextMate grammar Language...
vendor: wiji downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.quantumvm.qasm

item.title: Git Blame - Thu Jun 25 08:56:07 UTC 2026
item.description:
Git Blame shows real-time git blame info (author, date, commit message) inline at the end of each line in the editor, and displays the full commit hash in the status...
vendor: jinghongjiang downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: me.jinghong.git

item.title: Dependency Scout - Thu Jun 25 13:57:57 UTC 2026
item.description:
Dependency Scout helps you keep your Maven and Gradle dependencies up to date. Features: Automatic detection of outdated dependencies in build.gradle...
vendor: prshnt downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.prashant.dependencyscout

item.title: Claude Watch - Fri Jun 26 05:00:14 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Hemendra Sethi downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.hemendra.claudewatch

item.title: Claude Commit Message - Thu Jun 25 21:28:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Generates a Git commit message from your changes using Claude, right inside the commit dialog. It adds a button to the commit message toolbar (next to the AI Assistant...

item.title: ResponseInspector - Thu Jun 25 18:05:22 UTC 2026

item.title: JSONata - Thu Jun 25 11:38:40 UTC 2026

item.title: Ide-mcp - Thu Jun 25 17:55:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Ide-mcp lets AI agents control the IDE through its built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. It adds the IDE-automation tools that the bundled MCP server does not...
